suppress.notes: Reviewed 2026-06-10 False positive: CVE-2026-33117 applies to Microsoft Azure SDK. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - applicationinsights-spring-boot-starter 2.6.4 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.

Reviewed 2026-06-10 False positive: CVE-2025-7962 applies to Jakarta Mail. Affected libraries reported by dependency-check are: - eclipse:angus_mail:2.0.3 Versions of used libraries are their latest respectively.
